2235310.name: PatchWorld
2235310.description:
Welcome to PatchWorld, a social, immersive creativity platform where imagination meets innovation. Whether you're a musician, visual artist, performer, hobbyist, or curious explorer, PatchWorld empowers you to express your creativity in dynamic, real-time multiplayer virtual spaces.

PatchWorld is a modular, no-code, creative world-building platform that originated from modular music principles and evolved into a state-of-the-art creativity game engine. Create immersive scenes that seamlessly blend:

  • 🎵 Music-making

  • 🎨 Visual art

  • 🎮 Gameplay

  • 🔧 Interactive design

All in real-time, without writing a single line of code!

📦 Worlds: Your Creative Canvas

Your creations, called worlds, can include:

  • Virtual instruments

  • Immersive environments

  • Custom avatars

  • Dynamic visual effects

  • Interactive logic systems

👥 Who is PatchWorld For?

PatchWorld is designed to be accessible to both beginners and advanced users:

  • 🎹 Musicians & DJs compose and perform with loopers, sequencers, and synthesizers

  • 🎨 Visual Artists build immersive audiovisual installations and experiences

  • 🎭 Performers & Puppeteers use avatars and motion capture for storytelling

  • 📚 Educators & Collaborators co-create and share musical worlds for teaching

  • 🔧 Tinkerers & Developers experiment with logic, interactivity, and spatial computing

🚀 Why Choose PatchWorld?

Unlike traditional DAWs or VR apps that confine users to predefined modes, PatchWorld offers:

✨ Full Creative Freedom Seamlessly combine audio, visual, and logic elements without restrictions

🌐 Unified Creative Space Performance and creation happen in the same immersive environment

🤝 Social-First Design Built-in collaboration tools foster improvisation and live expression with others

⭐ Key Features

🥽 VR-Native Creation Build patches directly inside VR using intuitive interfaces and gestures

🎵 Performative Instruments Play and loop music in real-time with expressive virtual instruments

👥 Multiplayer Collaboration Jam, build, and perform with friends worldwide in shared spaces

💻 Desktop Companion Manage content, upload assets, and monitor VR sessions from your computer

🎭 Customizable Avatars Animate characters with motion capture for live performances

📹 Recording & Export Capture creations as video, audio, or mocap data to share anywhere

🧠 Gen AI optional AI tools to generate 3D meshes, audio, images, and skyboxes

🛒 Community Marketplace sell/buy devices
2235310.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
